Identity.Name: StingSystemCodes
Identity.Definition: System-type codes for the fifth segment (SYS) of the STING 8-segment tag. Derived from CIBSE / Uniclass 2015 Ss-table service classifications. The set is closed (corporate-locked) so cross-host validation works without per-project drift; project-specific subsystem grouping is expressed via FUNC, not SYS.

Governance.StandardsBasis: Uniclass 2015 Ss-table; CIBSE Guide A/B/C; STING tag config v5.0 (data/TAG_CONFIG_v5_0_DISC_SYS_FUNC.csv); STING Healthcare Pack

Value.Definition: Architectural elements not bound to an MEP system — walls, doors, windows, finishes. Default SYS for IFC architectural elements where the tag is required but no service applies.
Communications — voice, data, AV, structured cabling, telephony.
Domestic Cold Water — potable cold water supply per BS EN 806.
Domestic Hot Water — flow side of hot water service. Use HWS for the recirculation return.
Fire and Life Safety — alarm panels, detectors, AOV, smoke control panels, voice alarm.
Fire Protection — sprinklers, hose reels, fire-fighting water mains, suppression.
Natural / LPG fuel gas distribution. Medical gas uses MGS (under DISC=MG).
General / miscellaneous — fallback SYS for elements that don't fit any named service. Use sparingly; refer to STING tagging guide before adopting.
Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning — air-side mechanical systems.
Hot Water Service recirculation / return — anti-Legionella circulation. Distinct from DHW (flow) per HTM 04-01.
Information and Communications Technology — server room, IT infrastructure, structured fibre, data centre racks. Distinguished from COM (which is the building cabling carrying ICT).
Low Voltage power — ≤1000V AC distribution (panels, busways, sub-mains, final circuits).
Medical Gas Systems — piped medical gases (O2, N2O, AIR-4, AIR-7, VAC, AGSS, ENTONOX, CO2). Use under DISC=MG. Specific gas type carried in Pset_StingHealthcareMGS.GasType.
Nurse Call — patient-to-staff signalling, including dome lights, pull cords, emergency stations.
Rainwater Drainage — roof outlets, downpipes, syphonic systems.
Sanitary / Foul drainage — soil, waste, vent stacks per BS EN 12056.
Security systems — access control, CCTV, intruder detection, lockdown.
Structural — load-bearing assemblies. Used when DISC=S but SYS is required for tag completeness.
Unknown / not yet assigned. IDS fails this value at Stage 3+.
Wildcard for routing rules. Never tagged on an element.
